title: The Machine Learning Workflow for Continuous Internal Evaluation
description: A flowchart illustrating the iterative process of building, evaluating, and refining an AI model to achieve continuous improvement.
relationships: Data Preparation feeds into Model Training
Model Training produces a Model for Evaluation
Evaluation Metrics from Model Evaluation are analyzed in Performance Analysis
Insights from Performance Analysis guide Model Refinement
Model Refinement loops back to either Data Preparation or Model Training
